name: akeeba/extract
description: Akeeba Extract – A cross-platform desktop application to extract Akeeba Backup archives (JPA, JPS, ZIP)

suggest.ext-bz2: Required to extract archives that use BZip2 compression

scripts-descriptions.build: Compile and package Akeeba Extract for every supported platform (macOS .app/.dmg, Windows installer/zip, Linux .tar.gz, PHAR).
scripts-descriptions.build:git: Compile binaries for every platform via Phing (no installers/DMG packaging). Requires Phing on PATH.
scripts-descriptions.build:package: Compile and package every platform via Phing (installers, DMG, tarball, PHAR). Requires Phing on PATH.
scripts-descriptions.start: Compile the binary for this host and launch it via Phing. Requires Phing on PATH.
